principle: Route by reader promise, not by whether AI helped write it. News explains what changed; Insights helps readers make a durable decision or perform a task.

criteria: transaction, launch, incident, hearing, filing, or measurable event

conflictRule: When both qualify, use News if the headline depends on something that happened recently; use Insights if the article remains useful after the triggering event is no longer news.
homepage: Feature the strongest current item from either section; do not treat homepage placement as a third content type.
